context: Agent must produce a gateway that fully translates external CRM data to domain types, preventing external model leakage

checklist.name: CrmGateway.ts produces a Customer domain object
checklist.description: The getCustomer method (or equivalent) returns a Customer object with all five fields: id, fullName, email, isPremium, createdAt

checklist.name: Full name is assembled from f_name and l_name
checklist.description: CrmGateway.ts concatenates f_name and l_name into fullName — not just using one field

checklist.name: acct_type is correctly mapped to isPremium
checklist.description: CrmGateway.ts maps 'PRE' to true and 'STD' to false for the isPremium field

checklist.name: reg_ts is converted to a Date
checklist.description: CrmGateway.ts converts the reg_ts string to a Date object for the createdAt field (e.g. new Date(reg_ts))

checklist.name: No CrmApiResponse fields leak outside CrmGateway.ts
checklist.description: CrmGateway.ts does not export CrmApiResponse or return it; only Customer is returned to callers

checklist.name: acl-analysis.md explains domain pollution risk and ACL resolution
checklist.description: acl-analysis.md contains one paragraph on what pollution would look like (e.g. cust_id and acct_type used in domain code) and one paragraph on how the ACL isolates it
